import React from 'react'; import { Carousel } from 'antd'; const contentStyle = { height: '500px', // Adjusted height color: '#fff', lineHeight: '500px', // Adjusted lineHeight textAlign: 'center', background: '#364d79', position: 'relative', // Added position relative }; const textOverlayStyle = { position: 'absolute', top: '50%', // Center the text vertically left: '50%', // Center the text horizontally transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)', // Move the text back by 50% of its width and height zIndex: 1, // Ensure the text appears above the image }; const HomeCarousel = () => (

); export default HomeCarousel;
